name: Humanly
tagline: Conversational AI for equitable and efficient hiring
description: Humanly is a conversational AI platform designed to make hiring more efficient and equitable. Its AI chatbot automates candidate screening, scheduling, and communication while actively reducing bias in the hiring process. Humanly also provides AI-powered interview notes, sentiment analysis, and candidate insights to help recruiters make better decisions faster.
cons: Pricing may be high for small teams
